# daytona_jobs (Data Source)

Reads paginated Daytona background jobs visible to the configured credentials.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_jobs" "example" {
  limit = 50
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of jobs to return. Defaults to 100.
- `offset` (Number) Number of jobs to skip. Defaults to 0.
- `page` (Number) Page number to request. Defaults to 1.
- `status` (String) Optional job status filter, such as `PENDING`, `IN_PROGRESS`, `COMPLETED`, or `FAILED`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `items` (Attributes List) Returned jobs. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))
- `total` (Number) Total matching jobs.
- `total_pages` (Number) Total result pages.

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Job creation timestamp.
- `error_message` (String) Error message, when available.
- `id` (String) Job ID.
- `payload` (String) Job payload.
- `resource_id` (String) Resource ID associated with the job.
- `resource_type` (String) Resource type associated with the job.
- `status` (String) Job status.
- `trace_context_json` (String) Job trace context as JSON.
- `type` (String) Job type.
- `updated_at` (String) Job update timestamp.
